subject.name: Canyon Ridge
subject.location_note: Point from ArcGIS World Geocoder (PointAddress, score 100) for 2552 E Gowen Rd. Canyon Ridge is a 287-unit, 4-story apartment community completed 2024 on the south/southeast side of the Boise Airport (Gowen Field), inside the broad Airport Influence Area along E Gowen Rd.

analysis_area.note: 5-mile geodesic radius around the Canyon Ridge apartments at 2552 E Gowen Rd. Covers SE Boise: the Boise Airport / Gowen Field, Micron HQ and expansion (Columbia Bench), the Gowen Rd / Federal Way / Eisenman industrial corridor, Columbia Village, Barber Valley/Harris Ranch edge, and the unincorporated Ada County rural-urban frontier south and east.

parcel_sources.name: Ada County Assessor Parcels (AdaCountyGIS)
parcel_sources.note: Owner names are NOT published in Ada County GIS (Idaho Public Records Act). PROPCODE is the single-letter Ada County property class (R/C/F/L/M). ZONING is also carried on the parcel but we join zoning from the dedicated Zoning layer for clean base-zone codes.

landuse_scheme.name: Ada County Assessor Property Code (PROPCODE: R/C/F/L/M)
landuse_scheme.vacant_note: Ada County PROPCODE 'L' = Land (vacant lots + HOA/condo common-area land, many at $0 value) and 'F' = Farm (agricultural acreage). Both are treated as undeveloped 'vacant' for the supply-threat screen; HOA commons, floodplain, foothills-preservation (RP) and airport land are then reasoned out. PROPCODE definitions: R=Residential, C=Commercial, F=Farm, L=Land, M=Manufactured (Ada County Assessor GIS User Guide).
landuse_scheme.public_owner_regex: \b(CITY OF|AIRPORT|STATE OF|UNITED STATES|COUNTY OF|DEPT OF|DEPARTMENT OF|HIGHWAY|CEMETERY|SCHOOL DIST)\b

R: Residential (improved homes, condos, townhomes) - Ada PROPCODE R
M: Manufactured / mobile home - Ada PROPCODE M
C: Commercial property (retail/office/commercial condo) - Ada PROPCODE C
F: Farm / agricultural land (ag-exempt acreage) - Ada PROPCODE F
L: Land (vacant lots + HOA/condo common-area land) - Ada PROPCODE L
